displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
Meet your new parenting best friend, Huggies Clean Care Wipes! Changing and cleaning your baby is now made easier with wipes designed to clean your baby in just one or two wipes.Product features:
• Gentle on skin: Wipes are made from skin-loving natural fibre
• Dermatologically tested and pH balanced: Safe for sensitive & newborn skin
• Enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E to help soothe and moisturize skin
• Wipes away 99% of germs
• 3-in-1: Safe hands, face & body
• Soap, alcohol, paraben and MIT free

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: South Korea

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION

• Store at room temperature

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: The new Natural & Organic baby wipes, carefully formulated with organic extracts to cleanse and soften you and your babys skin. Safe to use for sensitive skin. Use it every day on the babys delicate skin, face, mouth, and bottom for a cleaner, fresher, and smoother skin. Suitable for newborns, babies, toddlers, sensitive skins, and safe for hand, mouth and utensils. - Natural and Organic ingredients - EWG Skin Deep Green Grade ingredients - Unscented - Free of toxic material for your skin - Alcohol Free - 8-steps purified water - Soft Touch Plain Fabric - Infant-friendly product - Allergy-friendly - Easy one-hand system (one sheet per pull) - Antibacterial packaging - Premium quality safe baby wipes - Sheet dimension : 150 x 200 mm (+/- 5mm), 350g - Plain Refill type - 100 sheets per packs - Made in Korea

product.description: Bundle of 3 packs x 30 sheets wipes

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Soothe little sore, stuffy noses with the gentle touch of calendula. Dr. Brown’s® Nose and Face Wipes use safe, plant-based ingredients like cleansing xylitol and gentle calendula to naturally clean baby’s nose and face of messy purees and other solid foods. When dry tissues tear up their skin, gently wipe away stuck-on snot, soothe irritated skin, and safely clean build-up in baby’s eyes. 30-wipe pack is travel friendly, easily fitting into your diaper bag or purse. No alcohol, SLS, formaldehyde, parabens or fragrance. Not tested on animals. Xylitol is dangerous to dogs, store out of their reach. 0m+. Made in the USA. Contents: Bundle of 3 packs x 30 sheets wipes

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: If you are looking for baby wipes suitable for newborns, this is the one. It has lanolin oil which provides additional moisture and also protection for your babys skin, preventing any skin damage from the multiple clean ups. Additionally, it also makes cleaning off stains much easier especially useful when its a diaper change for poop. It is extra thick for obvious reasons, because you know who wants to get poop on their hands really. And the thickness allows multiple wipes with one sheet, cost effectiveness checked! Also, you can use it to wipe your babys buttocks with just one hand no need to fumble around with two hands just to unfold it. As newborns are more delicate, using this baby wipe that is made especially for them is a good idea.<

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Thailand

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool dry area

Additionally, it also makes cleaning off stains much easier especially useful when its a diaper change for poop. It is extra thick for obvious reasons, because you know who wants to get poop on their hands really. And the thickness allows multiple wipes with one sheet, cost effectiveness checked! Also, you can use it to wipe your babys buttocks with just one hand no need to fumble around with two hands just to unfold it. As newborns are more delicate, using this baby wipe that is made especially for them is a good idea.<
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry area

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Pureen Baby Wipes Flushable is Flushable and Biodegradable plant-based material - Can flush into the toilet. Recommended disposal of wipes: Flush one wipe at a time. - Able to break down after flushing and biodegrade over time. - Flushability is tested in accordance with INDA/EDANA Flushability Guidelinesand Code of Practice. Hypoallergenic and Dermatologist Tested - Clinically proven not to induce skin irritation and allergic reaction even for sensitive skin. Extra Moist and Fortified with Moisturising Ingredients - Fortified with Vitamin E and Aloe Vera to protect and soothe baby skin. Fragrance free, Alcohol free and Paraben free - Gentle on skin and suitable for individual with sensitive skin. Usage Pureen Baby Wipes (Flushable) are environmentally-friendly and suitable for: Babies: Keep babies fresh and clean. Use at changing time, mealtimes, playtime, at home or on the go.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: The new Natural & Organic baby wipes, carefully formulated with organic extracts to cleanse and soften you and your babys skin. Safe to use for sensitive skin. Use it every day on the babys delicate skin, face, mouth, and bottom for a cleaner, fresher, and smoother skin. Suitable for newborns, babies, toddlers, sensitive skins, and safe for hand, mouth and utensils. - Natural and Organic ingredients - EWG Skin Deep Green Grade ingredients - Unscented - Free of toxic material for your skin - Alcohol Free - 8-steps purified water - Soft Touch Plain Fabric - Infant-friendly product - Allergy-friendly - Easy one-hand system (one sheet per pull) - Antibacterial packaging - Premium quality safe baby wipes - Sheet dimension : 150 x 200 mm (+/- 5mm), 350g - Plain Refill type - 100 sheets per packs - Made in Korea
